gd.t:
[计] 图形显示
[医] 钆(64号元素)
gd.d:
n a nerve agent easily absorbed into the body; a lethal cholinesterase inhibitor that is highly toxic when inhaled
n a ductile silvery-white ductile ferromagnetic trivalent metallic element of the rare earth group

gda.t: abbr. gun-damage assessment 炮轰破环（情况）判定; gun-defended area 高射炮防区

gdansk.t: 格但斯克(旧称Danzig但泽, 波兰港市)
gdansk.d: n. a port city of northern Poland near the mouth of the Vistula River on a gulf of the Baltic Sea; a member of the Hanseatic League in the 14th century

gdc.t: abbr. 图形显示控制器（Graphic Display Controller）；游戏开发者大会（Game Developers Conference）

gdf.t: n. 气体动力设备（Gas Dynamic Facility）

gdl.t: abbr. ground dynamic laser 地面动力激光器

gdm.t: abbr. 妊娠糖尿病（Gestational Diabetes Mellitus）；全局数据管理程序（Global Data Manager）

gdn.t: abbr. garden 花园; 庭院; graduation 刻度（线）; guardian 保护人

gdnf.t: abbr. glial cell-line derived neurotrophic factor 胶质细胞源性的神经营养因子

gdns.t: (gdn 的复数) abbr. garden 花园; 庭院; graduation 刻度（线）; guardian 保护人

gdo.t: abbr. grid-dip oscillator 栅陷振荡器; gun direction officer 枪炮指挥军官

gdos.t: (gdo 的复数) abbr. grid-dip oscillator 栅陷振荡器; gun direction officer 枪炮指挥军官

gdp.d: n the measure of an economy adopted by the United States in 1991; the total market values of goods and services produced by workers and capital within a nation's borders during a given period (usually 1 year)

gdps.t: (GDP 的复数) [化] 鸟苷二磷酸
gdps.d:
plural of GDP
n the measure of an economy adopted by the United States in 1991; the total market values of goods and services produced by workers and capital within a nation's borders during a given period (usually 1 year)

gdr.t: abbr. guard rail 保护栏杆, 护轨
